risk_factors: Net interest margin compression as deposit beta rises
Concentration in commercial real estate lending
Rising delinquency in subprime auto book
Unrealized losses in held-to-maturity Treasury portfolio
company.ai_summary: Mastercard Incorporated's complaint velocity has accelerated meaningfully over the trailing four quarters, with 6 complaints/quarter normalized for headcount well above peer median. Combined with 2 8-K filings over the past 90 days and essentially flat revenue trajectory, we maintain a High risk view and recommend underweight positioning into the next reporting cycle.
